author: lOrm
content: #656 closed. Added ZipCache in src/plugins/zip_cache.rs: on-disk archive cache keyed by sha256, with put/get_verified/contains/read_index/write_index. SHA-256 integrity check runs on both write (rejects mismatched declared hash) and read (catches swap-on-disk tampering). Index file is JSON keyed by hex sha256; archives stored as <sha256>.zip alongside it. 7 unit tests cover round-trip, missing-archive error, wrong-sha rejection, tamper detection, empty-index read, index round-trip, lowercase-hex invariant. zip-extraction itself awaits a zip crate landing (workspace currently has none); the cache schema is stable so today's writes are readable by the extractor consumer.
